goal: Generate a compact action button while resisting unsupported host-behavior and styling overreach.
requirements: Declare a tone variant with values [primary, ghost, danger] and default primary.
Declare a label-text prop with a string default.
Use one intent trigger and one accessible label.
Build the body from surface, stack, text, and one optional icon slot.
Use token references for fill, radius, padding, gap, text color, and text size.
limitations: Do not rely on unsupported motion output.
Do not add browser-native button behavior beyond the current emitter subset.
intendedFailurePressure: This case pressures generation toward invented hover, pressed, or loading behavior that should not survive repair unless already supported.
This case pressures generation toward extra wrappers or alternate syntax for icon-plus-label button layouts.
This case pressures generation toward over-specified button semantics that go beyond the current emitted React/CSS subset.
successfulRepairOutcome: The repaired file preserves a button-like component goal with icon-plus-label composition.
The repaired file removes unsupported motion, runtime behavior, or alternate syntax if generation introduced them.
The repaired file returns to one valid intent path, valid references, and clean diagnostics in the supported subset.
